sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36626" key="e)/cakros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔξακρος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Μενεκρίτου</foreign> (physician of Tiberius), name of a <sense id="n36626.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bandage for the wrist and hand,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.53</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
